query: bowel gas CT simulation brachytherapy dose calculation artifact

results.title: An Update on Acute Mesenteric Ischemia.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 35544414. 2023/02/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Abdominal computed tomography guided online adaptive SABR treatments 
can be complicated by bowel gas artifact. We investigated whether prolonged 
patient supine positioning decreases bowel gas artifact.
METHODS AND MATERIALS: Three radiation oncologists, a physicist, and an advanced 
practice radiation therapist scored bowel gas artifact in 1644 images from 104 
cone beam computed tomography (CBCT) data sets acquired in 52 fractions 
delivered to
